notes: Mistral Phase 3 with tRPC SSE template. DB: response_type=mistral_trpc_sse, h2_mode=2 (keep-alive), h2_end_stream=0, h2_hold_request=1, path=/api/chat. Envelope: tRPC numbered-line format (15:{json}, 8:null). Verify: (1) warning text visible in chat, (2) no ERR_CONNECTION errors, (3) check if network error artifact appears.
